data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The evidence provided does not demonstrate that the system has implemented the necessary receipt and refund logic per individual payer. While the linked use case describes a scenario where refunds route back to each original payer, there is no concrete evidence in the prior steps that confirms this functionality is operational or validated. Specifically, the evidence does not include any details about how refunds are processed for each payer, indicating a gap in the requirement coverage.
gaps: No evidence of receipt and refund logic being implemented per individual payer.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
